meanings.definition: the housing or outer covering of something
examples: the clock has a walnut case

meanings.definition: the outermost covering of a pneumatic tire
the enclosing frame around a door or window opening
examples: the casings had rotted away and had to be replaced

meanings.definition: look over, usually with the intention to rob
enclose in, or as if in, a case
examples: my feet were encased in mud
